# Line Check (对词间)

> Interview coach that turns your resume and job description into speakable answers you can practice out loud.

Line Check is a free web app (PWA) for interview rehearsal in English, Mandarin, or bilingual mix. Paste or upload a resume and JD, generate tailored Q&A, listen with text-to-speech, then export audio or PDF.

## Who it's for

- Job seekers who want answers they can say out loud, not just write
- Bilingual candidates practicing English and/or Chinese interviews
- Anyone preparing from a real resume + role posting

## Links

- App: https://linecheck-ai.vercel.app/
- Sitemap: https://linecheck-ai.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## Notes

- Settings (`/settings`) is a utility page — not for indexing
- Pricing: free
